commands.review_summary:
The PR updates the ClawDock dashboard helper to rewrite loopback dashboard URLs to Docker Compose's published gateway port, append and redact token auth, reduce fragile parsing dependencies, and add a changelog entry.

Reproducibility: yes. Source inspection gives a high-confidence reproduction path: configure `OPENCLAW_GATEWAY_PORT` to a host port other than 18789, then current main's `clawdock-dashboard` opens the URL printed inside the Compose network namespace instead of the host-published port.
commands.review_followup: No repair lane is needed because there is no concrete review finding for automation; the remaining action is normal maintainer review and merge decision.

target.title: fix(clawdock): open dashboard via clawdock-dashboard on published port instead of hardcoded default port
target.author: dhoman
